title: Root, Inc. Q4 2024 Financial Results
text: Root, Inc., a technology-driven insurance company, announced its Q4 2024 financial results, achieving profitability for the first time in company history with a GAAP net income of $31 million and adjusted EBITDA of $112 million for the full year 2024. Net premiums earned reached $1.07 billion, up substantially from $399.9 million in 2023. Gross premiums written totaled $1.3 billion, representing 66% year-over-year growth. Gross combined ratio improved to 94.7% from 116.7% in the prior year. Net income swung to $31 million profit from a $147.4 million loss in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA rose to $112 million versus a $43 million loss in 2023. The company expanded its policies in force by 21% to 414,862 policies. A gross loss ratio of 58.9% was achieved through enhanced pricing algorithms and underwriting technology. The Partnerships channel experienced 115% growth in new writings year-over-year. Root also reduced reinsurance expenses and cut interest costs by approximately 50% on an annualized basis. CEO Alex Timm stated the company achieved profitability and set a strong foundation for future growth through data science methods. Root plans to leverage its marketing capabilities and expand partnership channels while refining pricing models.
